parameters.responseBody: ={{ { ok: true, action: 'alta', message: 'Contrato creado', data: $json } }}

={{ { ok: true, action: 'consulta', dias_proximos: $items('Validate Input', 0, 0)[0].json.dias_proximos, total: $items('Filter Proximos Vencer').length, data: $items('Filter Proximos Vencer').map(i => i.json) } }}
={{ { ok: true, action: 'extension', message: 'Contrato extendido y Notificado_Previo reseteado', data: $json } }}
={{ { ok: false, error: 'ValidationError', message: 'Input invalido' } }}

={{ { ok: true, action: 'baja_manual', message: 'Contrato finalizado manualmente', data: $json, meta: { correlation_id: $items('Validate Input',0,0)[0].json.correlation_id, execution_id: $execution.id, actor: $items('Validate Input',0,0)[0].json.actor, timestamp: $items('Validate Input',0,0)[0].json.request_ts } } }}

={{ { ok: true, action: 'listar_ads', data: $json, meta: { correlation_id: $items('Validate Input',0,0)[0].json.correlation_id, execution_id: $execution.id, actor: $items('Validate Input',0,0)[0].json.actor, timestamp: $items('Validate Input',0,0)[0].json.request_ts } } }}

={{ { ok: true, action: $json.action, data: { accepted: true, tracking_id: $json.tracking_id, correlation_id: $json.correlation_id, status: 'queued' }, meta: { execution_id: $json.execution_id || $execution.id, actor: $json.actor, timestamp: $json.requested_at } } }}

={{ { ok: true, action: 'history', data: $json, meta: { correlation_id: $items('Validate Input',0,0)[0].json.correlation_id, execution_id: $execution.id, actor: $items('Validate Input',0,0)[0].json.actor, timestamp: $items('Validate Input',0,0)[0].json.request_ts } } }}
